title: Shine default spec fields
description: Shared spec constraints applied to every Datadog catalog entity type: lifecycle, tier, area, and domain.

lifecycle.description: The maturity state of the entity (not the deployment environment).

tier.description: House criticality tier (1=highest). Use 'none' for experimental or unmaintained entities.

area.description: Organisational area that owns this entity.

domain.description: Business domain this entity belongs to.
